narrative:
Franklin (precinct in Fulton County) has 493 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.1 percentage points.
